title: andira jaliscensis
intro: Andira jaliscensis, also known as the "Pink Trumpet Tree," is a flowering plant native to Mexico. The medicinal properties of Andira jaliscensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems, among other uses. Andira jaliscensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or its flowers and leaves can be dried and used in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
